fallbackReason: Every section must declare a nonempty data-section hook.

designNotes.aesthetic: A workshop inspired layout with warm desert colors, strong typography, simple line drawings, and visible mechanical details. Services appear in one clear list rather than a grid of decorative cards.
designNotes.signatureMove: A simple bicycle wheel illustration sits beside the service list. Moving across a service highlights one spoke while the full service text remains visible.
designNotes.rationale: A deterministic editorial baseline preserves the brief and accessibility when model generation is unavailable.
designNotes.shootDirection: Natural morning light tactile materials calm framing and one consistent lens feel
